heading: PERFORMANCE OF TEACHING SERVICES IN LIEU OF PAYMENT OF SCHOOL TAXES ON HOMESTEAD
operative_text: The governing body of a school district by resolution may permit qualified individuals to perform teaching services for the school district at a junior high school or high school of the district in lieu of paying taxes imposed by the district on property owned and occupied by the individual as a residence homestead.

defined_terms.definition_excerpt:
An individual is qualified to perform teaching services for a school district under this section only if the individual holds a baccalaureate or more advanced degree in a field related to each course to be taught and:
(1) is certified as a classroom teacher under Subchapter B, Chapter 21, Education Code; or
(2) obtains a school district teaching permit under Section 21.055, Education Code.
